title: The Razor's Edge
writer: Lamar Trotti, W. Somerset Maugham, Darryl F. Zanuck
actors: Tyrone Power, Gene Tierney, John Payne
plot: An adventuresome young man goes off to find himself and loses his socialite fiancée in the process. But when he returns ten years later, she will stop at nothing to get him back, even though she is already married.
